description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named main that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of five jobs: test, lint, cov, docs, and publish. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, and running tox. The lint, cov, and docs jobs run on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python, and running tox for linting, coverage, and documentation, respectively. The publish job depends on the test, lint, and docs jobs and publishes the package to PyPI if the event is a push to a tag.
